components.name: Accordion
components.description: Props for the Accordion component - collapsible content container. Wraps one or more `Accordion.Item` children in a panel that can be individually expanded or collapsed. Supports a header title and an expand/collapse-all control.

components.name: Alert
components.description: Props for the Alert component - contextual feedback banner. Displays an inline message with an optional icon, action link, and configurable severity type and size.

components.name: BaseTheme
components.description: for color customisation, can specify subset of set

components.name: BoxContainer
components.description: Props for the BoxContainer component - collapsible titled card. Renders a bordered box with a header title and optionally a status icon, call-to-action element, and expand/collapse toggle.

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Props for the Breadcrumb component - horizontal navigation trail. Renders an ordered list of anchor links representing the current page hierarchy. When links overflow, a fade gradient is applied at the scrollable edges.

components.name: Button
components.description: Props for the Button component - primary call-to-action element Use buttons to trigger immediate actions like form submissions, dialog confirmations, or navigation. Choose the appropriate style type based on action hierarchy. The button comes in two sizes: Default and Small, available via Button.Default and Button.Small.

components.name: Calendar
components.description: Props for the Calendar component - standalone date picker. Renders a full calendar view for selecting a single date. Extends `CommonCalendarProps` which provides min/max dates, disabled dates, and locale settings.

components.name: Card
components.description: Props for the Card component - elevated content container. Renders a styled box with a white background and rounded corners. Inherits all `HTMLDivElement` attributes.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Props for the Checkbox component - binary selection control. Renders a styled checkbox with optional indeterminate state. Inherits all standard `HTMLInputElement` attributes.

components.name: CountdownTimer
components.description: Props for the CountdownTimer component - floating sticky countdown display. Renders a countdown clock that sticks to the viewport edge as the user scrolls. When the remaining time falls below `notifyTimer`, the `onTick` and `onNotify` callbacks fire. Use `show` to start or pause the timer.

components.name: DataTable
components.description: Props for the DataTable component - tabular data display with selection. DataTable organises row data into columns and supports sortable headers, optional row selection, loading states, sticky headers, and empty states. Use it when users need to scan, compare, and act on structured data.

components.name: DateInput
components.description: Props for the DateInput component - single date picker with calendar overlay. Displays a text input that opens an inline calendar for selecting a single date. Controlled via a `"YYYY-MM-DD"` string value. Supports optional confirmation buttons, disabled and read-only modes, and focus/blur callbacks.

components.name: DateRangeInput
components.description: Props for the DateRangeInput component - date range picker with calendar overlay. Displays two linked text inputs (start and end) that open a shared calendar for selecting a date range. Controlled via `"YYYY-MM-DD"` string values. Supports week, month, and fixed-day range variants in addition to the default free-range mode.

components.name: Divider
components.description: Props for the Divider component - horizontal rule separator. Renders a styled horizontal rule with configurable thickness, line style, color, and optional grid column span (via `ColDiv` layout props).

components.name: Drawer
components.description: Props for the Drawer component - slide-in side panel. Renders a panel that slides in from the side of the screen, overlaying the page content. Toggled via the `show` prop and dismissed via the close button or overlay click callbacks.

components.name: ErrorDisplay
components.description: Base content attributes for the ErrorDisplay component. Shared between `ErrorDisplayProps` and the DataTable `emptyView` override.

components.name: FeedbackRating
components.description: Props for the FeedbackRating component - star-rating survey widget. Renders an optional banner image, a description prompt, a row of star buttons, and a submit button. Controlled via the `rating` prop.

components.name: FileUpload
components.description: Props for an individual file item displayed in the upload list.

components.name: Filter
components.description: Props for the Filter component - collapsible filter panel. Renders a panel of `Filter.Item` children with a header title, clear button, and mobile-specific dismiss/done controls.

components.name: Footer
components.description: Any custom attributes you would like to pass to the link

components.name: Form
components.description: Configuration for an informational addon attached to a Form label. Renders as a tooltip or popover triggered by an icon next to the label, providing supplementary context without cluttering the form field.

components.name: FullscreenImageCarousel
components.description: Props for the FullscreenImageCarousel component - fullscreen image gallery modal. Renders a modal overlay with a swipeable image carousel and optional thumbnail strip. Extends key `ModalProps` fields for visibility and animation.

components.name: HistogramSlider
components.description: Represents a single bin in the histogram distribution chart.

components.name: IconButton
components.description: Props for the IconButton component - icon-only button. Renders a square button containing only an icon child. Extends all `HTMLButtonElement` attributes. Choose the style type based on hierarchy and the size type based on available space.

components.name: ImageButton
components.description: Props for the ImageButton component - image thumbnail button. Renders a clickable image tile with selected and error visual states. Extends all `HTMLButtonElement` attributes.

components.name: Input
components.description: Props for the Input component - single-line text entry field. Extends all standard HTML `<input>` attributes. Use for free-text, numeric, email, telephone, or search entry in forms. Supports optional clear button, error state, and a borderless style variant.

components.name: InputGroup
components.description: The type of addon attached to the InputGroup. - `"label"`: Fixed text prefix or suffix (e.g., currency symbol, unit). - `"list"`: Selectable dropdown addon (e.g., country-code selector). - `"custom"`: Arbitrary JSX content as the addon.

components.name: InputMultiSelect
components.description: Props for the InputMultiSelect component - multi-option dropdown selector. Allows the user to choose multiple options from a dropdown list with checkboxes. Supports async option loading, search, and controlled selected state. For single-option selection use `InputSelect`.

components.name: InputNestedMultiSelect
components.description: Props for the InputNestedMultiSelect component - multi-option hierarchical dropdown. Allows the user to drill into nested categories and select multiple values from a three-level hierarchy (L1 → L2 → L3). Use `InputNestedSelect` for single value selection. Supports search and async loading.

components.name: InputNestedSelect
components.description: Props for the InputNestedSelect component - single-option hierarchical dropdown. Allows the user to drill into nested categories to select a single value from a three-level hierarchy (L1 → L2 → L3). Use `InputNestedMultiSelect` for selecting multiple values. Supports search and async loading.

components.name: InputRangeSelect
components.description: A generic from/to pair used by InputRangeSelect for options and selected values.

components.name: InputRangeSlider
components.description: Shared configuration props used by both `InputSlider` and `InputRangeSlider`.

components.name: InputSelect
components.description: The list of options to display in the dropdown.

components.name: InputSlider
components.description: Props for the InputSlider component - single-thumb numeric slider. Renders a horizontal slider with a single thumb for selecting a numeric value within a given range. Supports step intervals, track colour customisation, and value labels. For a dual-thumb range slider use `InputRangeSlider`.

components.name: Layout
components.description: Shared layout props for all layout container components.

components.name: LinkList
components.description: Props for the LinkList component - list of labelled hyperlinks. Renders a vertical list of titled link items with optional descriptions. If `maxShown` is set, extra items collapse behind a "Show more" toggle.

components.name: MaskedInput
components.description: The async load state for a MaskedInput in read-only mode. - `"loading"`: Shows a loading indicator. - `"fail"`: Shows an error state with a retry action. - `"success"`: Value is loaded and displayed.

components.name: Masonry
components.description: number of columns on desktop resolutions

components.name: Masthead
components.description: Note: Had to use this method because we had to create a custom type to handle Web Components (refer to this guide https://blog.devgenius.io/how-to-use-web-components-in-react-54c951399bfd) But we are having troubles exporting the custom type definition via rollup

components.name: Modal
components.description: Props for the Modal component - animated overlay dialog. Renders content inside a portal injected into the DOM. Supports directional slide-in animation, optional overlay-click dismissal, and custom z-index for stacked modals. Toggle visibility with the `show` prop.

components.name: NavbarHeight
components.description: Navbar action buttons for mobile drawer. Takes desktop if not specified

components.name: NotificationBanner
components.description: Props for the NotificationBanner component - dismissible top-of-page banner. Renders a full-width banner with optional sticky positioning and a dismiss button. Toggle visibility with the `visible` prop.

components.name: OtpInput
components.description: Props for the OtpInput component - one-time password entry field. Renders a row of individual character inputs for OTP entry, with a configurable submit button and a cooldown timer that re-disables the button after each submission.

components.name: Overlay
components.description: Props for the Overlay component - backdrop overlay portal. Renders a semi-transparent backdrop injected into the DOM that can optionally blur the content behind it. Used as a layer beneath modals, drawers, and other floating UI elements.

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Props for the Pagination component - page navigation control. Renders page number buttons and optional first/last navigation, with an optional page-size dropdown. Requires `totalItems` and `activePage` to be controlled by the parent.

components.name: PhoneNumberInput
components.description: A country entry used to populate the country-code dropdown.

components.name: Pill
components.description: Props for the Pill component - compact label badge. Renders a small pill-shaped tag with a configurable display style (solid fill or outline) and color scheme. Inherits all `HTMLDivElement` attributes.

components.name: Popover
components.description: Props for the Popover component - floating content bubble. Renders a floating tooltip-style bubble positioned relative to its trigger element. Controlled via the `visible` prop.

components.name: PopoverV2
components.description: Props for the PopoverV2 component - floating content bubble (v2). The base popover bubble controlled via `visible`. For most use cases prefer `PopoverV2.Trigger` which handles positioning automatically.

components.name: PredictiveTextInput
components.description: Props for the PredictiveTextInput component - autocomplete text input. Displays suggestions fetched asynchronously as the user types. The suggestions list appears after a configurable minimum number of characters have been entered. Selecting a suggestion calls `onSelectOption`. Used for location search, name lookup, and other typeahead scenarios.

components.name: ProgressIndicator
components.description: Props for the ProgressIndicator component - step progress tracker. Renders a horizontal row of step labels with the current step highlighted. Supports a custom display extractor for non-string step items.

components.name: RadioButton
components.description: Props for the RadioButton component - single-choice input control. Renders a styled radio button. Inherits all standard `HTMLInputElement` attributes including `checked`, `disabled`, `value`, and `onChange`.

components.name: Sidenav
components.description: Props for the Sidenav component - vertical side navigation panel. Renders a fixed-left sidebar containing `Sidenav.Group` children with icon-labelled items and optional drawer sub-items.

components.name: SmartAppBanner
components.description: Props for the SmartAppBanner component - mobile app download prompt. Renders a banner that prompts users to download the mobile app. Supports optional slide-down animation and a dismiss callback.

components.name: Tab
components.description: Props for the Tab component - tabbed content panel. Renders a row of tab selectors and shows the content of the active tab. Can be used in uncontrolled mode (`initialActive`) or controlled mode (`currentActive`).

components.name: Tag
components.description: Props for the Tag component - interactive label badge. Like `Pill` but supports an interactive state with pointer cursor and press effects. Inherits all `HTMLElement` attributes.

components.name: Text
components.description: Props for the Text component - typography primitives for the design system.

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Props for the InputTextarea component - multi-line text entry field. Extends all standard HTML `<textarea>` attributes. Use when the user needs to enter more than one line of text, such as comments, descriptions, or messages. Supports character count display and error state.

components.name: TextList
components.description: Ordered list component props - numbered or lettered list. Renders an `<ol>` with configurable counter style, separator, start value, and optional reverse counting.

components.name: Timepicker
components.description: The time display format used by the Timepicker. - `"12hr"`: 12-hour clock with AM/PM suffix (e.g., `"01:00PM"`). - `"24hr"`: 24-hour clock (e.g., `"13:00"`).

components.name: TimeRangePicker
components.description: The time display format used by TimeRangePicker. - `"12hr"`: 12-hour clock with AM/PM suffix. - `"24hr"`: 24-hour clock.

components.name: TimeSlotBar
components.description: The type of style of the time slot. Values: "default" | "stripes"

components.name: TimeSlotBarWeek
components.description: Props for the TimeSlotBarWeek component - week-view time slot calendar. Renders a week calendar with per-day `TimeSlotBar` columns and an optional navigation header. Extends `CommonCalendarProps` for min/max date and locale settings.

components.name: TimeSlotWeekView
components.description: Props for the TimeSlotWeekView component - week-view availability grid. Renders a calendar week grid that overlays time slot availability on each day. Unlike `TimeSlotBarWeek`, slots are optional and the component focuses on date selection. Extends `CommonCalendarProps`.

components.name: Toast
components.description: Props for the Toast component - temporary notification message. Renders a status notification that can auto-dismiss after a configurable duration. Extends all `HTMLDivElement` attributes.

components.name: Toggle
components.description: Props for the Toggle component - checkbox/radio selection control. Renders a styled toggle button that acts as a checkbox (allows deselection) or radio button (no deselection). The `type` prop controls behaviour and indicator icon.

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Props for the Tooltip component - floating informational bubble. Renders a small floating label positioned relative to its trigger element. Controlled via the `visible` prop.

components.name: UneditableSection
components.description: The width that the item can span across. Values: "half", "full"

components.name: UnitNumber
components.description: Props for the UnitNumberInput component - Singapore-style unit number entry. A specialised input pair for entering a floor-unit combination in the format commonly used in Singapore addresses (e.g., `#12-345`). Emits the combined string value and optionally the raw `[floor, unit]` array.
